title: The Iron Veil
author: Toom Originals
description: In the forge-city of Ashmark, master blacksmith Kaden can do what no other can: smelt weapons from memories. When a hooded stranger offers him her most painful recollection to craft the ultimate blade, Kaden discovers the memory belongs to someone he once buried. A story of grief forged into steel, and vengeance that cuts both ways.

title: Moonthread
author: Toom Originals
description: Every night, a silver thread appears on Sera's wrist leading somewhere new. She follows it blindly — until it leads her to a boy who can see threads no one else can. He tells her the thread is a countdown. When it snaps, one of them disappears forever.

title: Null Division
author: Toom Originals
description: In a world where every citizen is assigned a combat rank at birth, Yara is classified Null — no rank, no rights, no future. When a black-ops unit recruits her for a suicide mission, she discovers that Null doesn't mean powerless. It means undetectable.

title: The Apothecary's Shadow
author: Toom Originals
description: In the imperial court, poisons are the currency of power. Lian, a lowborn apothecary's daughter, is smuggled into the palace as a food taster. She survives every attempt on her life — not by luck, but because she has been quietly poisoning herself for years. Now someone wants to know her secret.

title: Redline
author: Toom Originals
description: Street racer Dax loses everything in one crash — his car, his crew, and the use of his right hand. Told he will never race again, he rebuilds himself from the engine up. But the underground circuit doesn't forgive weakness, and the people who caused his crash are still out there.

title: Glass Throne
author: Toom Originals
description: The kingdom of Vel has no king — only a throne made of solidified lies that shatters anyone impure enough to sit on it. Lady Mireille is the first person in a century to touch it without bleeding. The court calls it a miracle. She knows it is something far more dangerous.

title: Echo Protocol
author: Toom Originals
description: When Detective Noa investigates a string of identical suicides, she finds that every victim left behind the same last words — words that match her own unpublished journal entries. Someone is reading her mind. Or she is somehow killing these people herself.

title: Salt & Steel
author: Toom Originals
description: Ex-royal guard Bram just wants a quiet life running a seaside inn. Instead, a twelve-year-old stowaway crashes through his roof claiming to be the rightful heir to the empire, and now every assassin on the continent knows his address. Retirement is overrated.

title: Between Worlds
author: Toom Originals
description: Ji-ho can see the last emotion a person felt before they died, imprinted on their skin like a watermark. She works as a morgue assistant and has learned to keep her distance from the living. Then she meets someone whose skin shows an emotion she has never seen before — and he is very much alive.

title: The Last Cartographer
author: Toom Originals
description: Maps in the Sunken Kingdoms do not show where places are — they show where places were. Cartographer's apprentice Ren discovers a map that shows a city that hasn't existed yet. Following it means walking into a future that may already be a ruin.
